title: New Kung Fu Cult Master 2
original_title: 倚天屠龍記之聖火雄風
overview: The masters of the Six Major Sects are trapped in Wan On Temple, each of whom was hit with the Ten Scents Poisonous Powder, and have lost all their martial powers.
